module.name: protocol
module.purpose: Owns the marix-protocol crate definitions and namespace exports for reusable session, task, step, execution, tool, and shared signature protocol contracts. The crate depends on marix-common so execution Preview events can include host System alongside tool previews, and enables uuid v5 so StepSignature can derive deterministic Signature ids from task signatures and step numbers.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task protocol contracts including task identifiers, events, request previews, signature-free TaskPreview request/result snapshots, TaskSignature values that implement Signature via their TaskId UUID, results, and statuses.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step protocol contracts including executable drafts, planning output, kinds, StepSignature values that implement Signature with deterministic uuid v5 ids derived from task id plus step_no, events, results, statuses, and previews.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns execution protocol contracts including execution ids, events whose Preview carries System and ToolPreview values, requests, ExecutionSignature values that implement Signature via ExeId UUIDs, updates, and statuses.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Owns tool schema and preview protocol contracts.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Local third-party re-export wiring for protocol internals.
